title: The Iron Will
description: You've proven yourself in countless battles, led soldiers through hell, and upheld the Iron Company's honor. Captain Roderick Steele now offers you the ultimate test: an honorable duel to prove you're worthy of becoming his second-in-command. Win, and you become the Iron Lieutenant - the Captain's right hand and heir to leadership.

objectives.description: Prepare for the ceremonial duel at the Iron Hall
Duel Captain Steele to prove your worth
Accept the rank of Iron Lieutenant
